steps.title: Identify the core requirement
steps.content: The goal requires identifying something both sculptures share—a thematic or artistic element drawn from the notes, not just biographical details or physical differences.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content:
The correct response directly identifies the thematic parallel: both Recognition and Students Aspire show figures in poses that symbolize supportive relationships.

The other choices either address only one sculpture, list only biographical facts or highlight physical contrasts rather than similarities.

That confirms B is correct.
